# Thesis: Layered tests catch regressions earlier

## Core Claim

Layered test suites catch regressions earlier than monolithic ones.

## Key Variables

- test-layering
- regression-detection
- feedback-speed

## Testable Prediction

Structural failures surface before behavioral evals run.

## Falsification Criteria

A monolithic suite catching the same regressions at equal speed and cost.
